title: Luffy Protects His Crew
description: Nami, Usopp, and Robin face Foxy’s tricks in the first Davy Back Fight event while Luffy learns how serious the stakes are.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, 19, 20, this scene focuses on Luffy, Nami, Foxy, Usopp, Zoro. Nami, Usopp, and Robin face Foxy’s tricks in the first Davy Back Fight event while Luffy learns how serious the stakes are.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Luffy, no! You can't accept this game!

summary: Nami, Usopp, and Robin face Foxy’s tricks in the first Davy Back Fight event while Luffy learns how serious the stakes are.
